description: schema_version forward-compatibility corpus: unknown additive-optional fields under chain_metadata.schema_version are accepted as valid, while unknown required or structural changes remain rejected. This closes the #173 / #210 gap and pins the #185 additive rule end-to-end.

cases.description: Baseline additive-minor bundle with no unknown fields; accepted to keep the replay matrix anchored on the known-good schema_version=1 shape.
Unknown additive-optional chain_metadata field under schema_version is accepted as valid; this is the forward-compatible acceptance vector.
Missing chain_metadata.schema_version remains a hard rejection.
Unknown major schema_version remains a hard rejection.
Unknown required/structural chain_metadata field remains rejected even when schema_version itself is otherwise valid.
